issues.claim: Analog does not equally apply elsewhere
issues.objection: Force-fit test for 7.26: the analog (thread 3 (Krishna knows past/present/future; no one knows him; STRETCHED)) is anchored to the verse's specific structural claim; it would not apply to a randomly chosen alternate verse. The verse's central image — for 7.26, the image specifically tied to thread 3 (Krishna knows past/present/future; no one knows him; STRETCHED) — is what the engineering scenario depends on; substituting another verse's image breaks the analog. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Verse claims structural mystery across the threefold time. Engineering analog scoped narrowly at single-career, single-system asymmetry between substrate-vantage and surface-vantage. Counter-example: senior knowledge that resists transmission is pathology.

notes: Force-fit test for 7.26: the engineering analog cannot equally well derive from a different verse. Tags (operator-system-coupling, team-state, system-recognition) are anchored on this verse's specific claim. PASS.
